name: dmatrix_corsair_rack
_comment: d-Matrix Corsair rack: 16 cards / 128 chiplets total. Per card: 2 GB on-die SRAM @ 150 TB/s + 256 GB LPDDR5 @ 400 GB/s + 2400 TFLOPs FP8 (9.6 PFLOPs FP4). The hbm_* fields here represent the LPDDR5 main memory (the field-name convention is 'main DRAM-like tier' regardless of underlying technology — see DeviceSpec docstring). Fabric is a single coarse rack-internal abstraction; the real device uses chiplet D2D (~1 TB/s) + PCIe + JetStream NIC at ~2 us. See sram.md §3.2-§3.3 and references [DMATRIX-HC25, CHIPSANDCHEESE-DM].
